examples: He found congenial officers who knew how to leaven war's rigours with riotous enjoyment.
The organizers of the march were charged with assault and riotous assembly.
The dinner was often a riotous affair enlivened by superbly witty speeches.
It tells the story of an orphaned pig who gives himself a riotous birthday party.
Seven of eight people arrested in east Belfast have been charged with riotous behaviour.
